title: Jeff Yang

author.name: Jeff Yang
author.summary: I blog about web development, ideas, and my daily journey as an aspiring software engineer.

description: A personal blog by Jeff Yang.

home.title: Hi! I'm Jeff 👋
home.description: Hi, I am Jeff, a college student always looking for ways to learn, and make a positive impact on this world. My hope is that this space helps achieve even a fraction of that goal, and open up opportunities to learn from the world. Thanks for stopping by, and hopefully, enjoy!
